page_title: Manned Lunar Landing Shuttle (Geological Survey Type)
text:
is an aircraft that appears in Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance.

Features

History

Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance

The shuttle carries the Gendo Ikari and Kōzō Fuyutsuki to the Tabgha Base in the Mare Tranquilitatis region of the Moon, to inspect the Evangelion Mark.06 under construction.

Development

It was designed by Hideaki Anno for the Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance film. Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance - Complete Records - Setting Material Edition p.95
